steps.title: Match the target expression
steps.content:
The target expression $14x-1$ is exactly twice the left side of the given equation:
$$
2(7x-\frac{1}{2})=14x-1
$$

steps.title: Double the whole equation
steps.content: Multiply both sides by $2$: $$ 2(7x-\frac{1}{2})=2(-8) $$ $$ 14x-1=-16 $$ The answer is D.
